exemplar.title: Does some knowledge belong only to particular communities of knowers?

detailedExemplarData.title: Does some knowledge belong only to particular communities of knowers?

strengths: Clear selection and consistent linking of each real-world object to the chosen prompt
Explicit statement of real-world contexts (dates, sources, personal significance) with specific images
Detailed commentary on community-specific knowledge, drawing on cultural symbolism, procedural expertise and familial experience
Frequent anchoring of claims back to the IA prompt and occasional use of TOK concepts (open texture, areas of knowledge)
Strong justification showing how each object contributes to the overall argument
weaknesses: Explanations sometimes drift into general description rather than focusing sharply on exclusivity of knowledge
Limited evidence and thin citation base (only two sources, one anecdotal), lacking breadth
Analysis lacks critical counter-perspectives or rigorous evaluation of wider sharing of the knowledge
Terminology occasionally loose and narrative detail overshadows epistemological analysis
Inconsistent and incomplete referencing in the Works Cited section
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs exhibition meets the descriptors for the 7â8 band: all three objects are clearly identified with explicit contexts, and the links to prompt 14 are well explained and convincingly justified. Commentary is detailed and anchored in TOK concepts, demonstrating a coherent understanding of community-specific knowledge. However, the analysis does not reach the precision, depth of evidence, and critical sophistication required for the top band (9â10). The treatment sometimes slips into narrative or descriptive passages, and the citation base is limited. Consequently, awarding 8 marks accurately reflects performance at the stronger end of band 7â8 while acknowledging the limitations preventing a higher score.

annotations.comment: The student effectively anchors the exhibition prompt, making a clear and relevant connection to how knowledge belongs to specific communities.
The introductory casual phrasing is descriptive but lacks analytical focus; refine this sentence to emphasize the epistemological implications rather than informal tone.
Skillful articulation of intergenerational personal knowledge; this adds depth to the exploration of knowledge communities.
The example of cultural misinterpretation is engaging but could more explicitly tie back to the exclusivity of knowledge for clarity.
Strong application of the TOK concept 'open texture' to illustrate interpretive gaps between communities; well done.
The Baseel (2018) citation adds specificity but relying on a single source limits depth; incorporate additional theoretical perspectives.
The paragraph reiterates the exclusivity theme but could be tightened by focusing on the core epistemic insight rather than repeating ideas.
The personal narrative is compelling but drifts into storytelling; refocus to highlight the epistemological significance of this lived experience.
The object label is clear, but specifying the date and context of the gift in the header would strengthen the real-world framing.
The personal background on the clarinet provides context, but streamline this section to maintain analytical momentum.
Excellent distinction between procedural and propositional knowledge, demonstrating nuanced understanding of knowledge types in a community.
The conditional phrasing about knowledge acquisition is insightful but would benefit from a counterexample or critical perspective.
Interesting link to linguistic determinism, but deepen the analysis by engaging with critiques of this concept to show critical evaluation.
Gottlieb (2019) is cited, but the reference details are incomplete; ensure full citation format for consistency and credibility.
Strong conclusion on the inaccessibility of expert musical knowledge; consider acknowledging ways music knowledge can be shared more broadly.
The introductory header is present but could be more descriptive (e.g., include 'Family Photo Wall') to immediately situate the viewer.
The description of the photo wall is vivid, yet linking explicitly to the TOK distinction between personal and shared knowledge would enhance the argument.
Good analysis of outsider interpretation; including a concrete example of misinterpretation by someone outside the family could strengthen this point.
The final paragraph reiterates exclusivity effectively but edges into repetition; refine to emphasize a novel insight about familial knowledge.
The personal vs. common knowledge distinction is apt, but supporting this with TOK literature or definitions would ground the claim.
The Works Cited section is correctly titled; verify that it adheres to a consistent referencing style throughout.
The Baseel citation is missing access or DOI information; complete these details to meet academic referencing standards.
The Gottlieb citation is split and lacks publication details; consolidate into a single entry with full bibliographic information.
Only two sources are cited; incorporating a broader range of academic and theoretical sources would enhance the exhibitionâs credibility.
The commentary lacks critical counter-perspectives; introducing an alternative viewpoint would deepen the epistemological rigor of the exhibition.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
